maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit.
notes: 2026-06-25 run2 (13:30 UTC): Tasks 4+2. Task 4: Created CI workflow ci.yml (runs on push+PR to master, builds x64+arm64, no signing). Branch: repo-assist/eng-ci-pr-check-2026-06-25. Task 2: Only user issue #24 (HDR) already has Repo Assist comment from June 8, no new human activity. Many repo-assist branches exist with code but repo_assist_prs=0 suggests previous PR creations may not be landing. AppSettings still only has ExcludeFromCapture on master.
